creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
The rxvt port shows the MASTER_SITE as ftp://mason.primenet.com.au/pub/rxvt/.
 	It should be /pub/rxvt/old/

Fix: 

-Chris--jvEAHbsuJEEwxSWFwLetropbsCwCVIFxJftyXHHsTIpLii4F
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig       Thu Jan 28 18:59:16 1999
+++ Makefile    Thu Jan 28 18:59:24 1999
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 
 DISTNAME=      rxvt-2.4.11
 CATEGORIES=    x11
-MASTER_SITES=  ftp://mason.primenet.com.au/pub/rxvt/
+MASTER_SITES=  ftp://mason.primenet.com.au/pub/rxvt/old/
